collectors.description: Jobs stuck in 'processing' for over an hour
collectors.query: SELECT id, created_at FROM jobs WHERE status = 'processing' AND created_at < now() - ($1 || ' hours')::interval
collectors.title: {{count}} jobs stuck in processing
collectors.message: {{count}} job(s) have been in 'processing' longer than the lookback window. Oldest id: {{field:id}}.
collectors.suggestedFix: Re-run the job processor or reset stuck rows to 'pending'.

fix.command: UPDATE jobs SET status = 'pending' WHERE status = 'processing' AND created_at < now() - interval '1 hour'

collectors.description: Rows that ended in an error state in the window
collectors.query: SELECT count(*)::int AS n FROM events WHERE status = 'error' AND created_at > now() - ($1 || ' hours')::interval
collectors.title: Errors detected in events
collectors.message: {{field:n}} error events in the last window.

collectors.title: API /health is not returning 200
collectors.suggestedFix: Check the API service and its upstream dependencies.

collectors.title: Root disk usage at {{value}}%
collectors.suggestedFix: Free up disk or expand the volume.
